---
title: "Projets"
description: "Projets détaillés — scope, architecture, implémentation et résultats."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
